title: Nutritional Guidelines for Feeding Pet Rabbits
notes: Main source for rabbit_adult_maintenance numeric nutrient requirements. Values are for total diet at 12% moisture and assumed 10 MJ DE/kg when stated.

title: Nutrition of Rabbits
notes: Clinical synthesis. Useful for maintenance values, water intake, pellet amount, calcium and fibre practical values.

title: L'alimentation chez le lapin
notes: Francophone clinical source with concrete adult pellet thresholds, greens, water and treat quantities.

title: Caring for Your Pet Rabbit
notes: Useful for diet fraction, pellet quantity and greens quantity. Mostly owner-facing practical data.

title: Alfalfa hay
notes: Ingredient composition values only. Do not store as rabbit requirements.
